faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in East Flatbush homes?
faqs.answer: East Flatbush's mature trees, older housing stock, and seasonal temperature fluctuations make it particularly attractive to stink bugs seeking overwintering sites. The neighborhood's mix of single-family homes and multi-unit buildings with gaps around windows, doors, and siding provide easy access points for these pests during fall and early spring.
